issues.description: Action is 'Rest' but card text says 'set this Leader as active' (opposite effect). Should be a custom action or clarified as activating/unresting.

Missing conditional logic: effect should only trigger 'If this Leader battles your opponent's Character during this turn'. Current DSL has no battle condition. Requires either a Counter trigger on attack or conditional check.

Missing restriction action: 'this Leader cannot attack your opponent's Characters with a base cost of 7 or less during this turn' is not represented. Requires a GiveKeyword or custom restriction action with duration DuringYourTurn.
Trigger 'Activated' is correct for '[Activate: Main]', but the conditional structure doesn't capture the battle dependency properly.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x3] [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] If this Leader battles your opponent's Character during this turn, set this Leader as active. Then, this Leader cannot attack your opponent's Characters with a base cost of 7 or less during this turn.
